name: python3-idna
title: python3-idna
description:
Python IDNA2008 (RFC 5891) handling (Python 3)
A library to support the Internationalised Domain Names in Applications (IDNA)
protocol as specified in RFC 5891. This version of the protocol is often
referred to as “IDNA2008” and can produce different results from the earlier
standard from 2003.
.
The library is also intended to act as a suitable drop-in replacement for the
“encodings.idna” module that comes with the Python standard library but
currently only supports the older 2003 specification.
.
This package contains the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use idna because Python IDNA2008 (RFC 5891) handling (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use idna as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `idna [options] [args]` as documented upstream for idna.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair idna with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `idna --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
